languages.text: "Нет, Лорд-капитан. Только не после того, что он сделал для меня! Мне может не нравится его подход к людям, но его исключительные способности к врачеванию не терпят сомнений. К тому же, сам я теперь не в состоянии оперировать полноценно..."

"How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."
languages.original_text: "Нет, Лорд-капитан. Только не после того, что он сделал для меня! Мне может не нравится его подход к людям, но его исключительные способности к врачеванию не терпят сомнений. К тому же, сам я теперь не в состоянии оперировать полноценно..."

traits.locale_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

"How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

"How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

languages.text: 「どうして仲良くできないのですか、船長様。特に彼が私にしてくれたことを考えると！彼の人の扱い方は好きではないかもしれませんが、彼の優れた回復能力は疑う余地がありません。それに、私は今、一人で手術を完全にこなすことができません…」
languages.original_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

traits.locale_text: 「どうして仲良くできないのですか、船長様。特に彼が私にしてくれたことを考えると！彼の人の扱い方は好きではないかもしれませんが、彼の優れた回復能力は疑う余地がありません。それに、私は今、一人で手術を完全にこなすことができません…」

languages.text: "Nasıl anlaşamayız ki Lord Kaptan? Özellikle benim için yaptıklarından sonra! İnsanlara yaklaşımını beğenmeyebilirim ama olağanüstü iyileştirme yetenekleri tartışılmaz. Ayrıca artık prosedürleri tek başıma tam olarak gerçekleştiremiyorum..."
languages.original_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl anlaşamayız ki Lord Kaptan? Özellikle benim için yaptıklarından sonra! İnsanlara yaklaşımını beğenmeyebilirim ama olağanüstü iyileştirme yetenekleri tartışılmaz. Ayrıca artık prosedürleri tek başıma tam olarak gerçekleştiremiyorum..."

languages.text: «¿Cómo no vamos a llevarnos bien, Lord Capitán? ¡Especialmente después de lo que ha hecho por mí! No me gustará cómo trata a la gente, pero sus capacidades de curación son excepcionales, de eso no hay ninguna duda. Además, ahora no puedo realizar procedimientos completos por mí mismo...».
languages.original_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo no vamos a llevarnos bien, Lord Capitán? ¡Especialmente después de lo que ha hecho por mí! No me gustará cómo trata a la gente, pero sus capacidades de curación son excepcionales, de eso no hay ninguna duda. Además, ahora no puedo realizar procedimientos completos por mí mismo...».

languages.text: “我们怎么会合不来呢，舰长大人？特别是在他为我做了那些事之后！他待人接物的方式我可能不太喜欢，但他卓越的治疗能力毋庸置疑。更何况，我现在已经无法独自完成手术了……”
languages.original_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

traits.locale_text: “我们怎么会合不来呢，舰长大人？特别是在他为我做了那些事之后！他待人接物的方式我可能不太喜欢，但他卓越的治疗能力毋庸置疑。更何况，我现在已经无法独自完成手术了……”

languages.text: « Je ne vois pas ce qui vous fait dire ça, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, surtout après ce qu'il a fait pour moi ! Même si sa façon de voir les gens me déplaît, je reconnais volontiers que ses compétences de soignant sont exceptionnelles. De plus, je suis maintenant incapable d'opérer par mes propres moyens... »
languages.original_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois pas ce qui vous fait dire ça, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, surtout après ce qu'il a fait pour moi ! Même si sa façon de voir les gens me déplaît, je reconnais volontiers que ses compétences de soignant sont exceptionnelles. De plus, je suis maintenant incapable d'opérer par mes propres moyens... »

languages.text: "Wie sollten wir nicht miteinander auskommen, Lord Captain? Vor allem nach dem, was er für mich getan hat! Ich mag seinen Ansatz im Umgang mit Menschen nicht, aber seine außergewöhnlichen Fähigkeiten als Heiler stehen außer Frage. Außerdem kann ich jetzt Prozeduren gar nicht mehr alleine durchführen ..."
languages.original_text: "How could we not get along, Lord Captain? Especially after what he's done for me! I may not like his approach to people, but his exceptional healing abilities are beyond question. Besides, I am now unable to perform procedures fully by myself..."
